underlying_goal: Launch a Maimai (脉脉) automation project to search for candidates with keywords '安卓' and '研发', then send greetings to at least 10 people
friction_detail: Multiple pre-existing bugs: class definition ordering caused NameError, login check kept refreshing the page preventing login, and QuotaExhaustedError was silently swallowed causing unnecessary retries.
brief_summary: User wanted to run a Maimai automation tool to search and greet 10 candidates; search succeeded (19 found) but messaging failed due to zero contact quota, and Claude fixed three bugs along the way including login loop, error ordering, and quota error handling.
